impact_heading: Three decades of Bay Area community theatre!
donate_lede: Ticket sales and participation fees cover much of what we do. The rest comes from our wonderful donors - like you!
discovery_heading: Whatever you're looking for, we've got it

discovery_cards.title: Main Stage Productions
discovery_cards.body: Full-scale productions, performed by youth ages 6–18 at Mountain View's premier venue.

discovery_cards.eyebrow: For young performers, schools, families & readers
discovery_cards.title: Stories on Stage
discovery_cards.body: Beloved children's books brought to life in short, lively performances designed for young audiences and school groups. Actors aged 8-16 are cast in a small company each year.

discovery_cards.title: Classes & Camps
discovery_cards.body: From after-school drama and musical theatre, to holiday camps, our programs build skills, confidence, and friendships. Ages 4–18.

discovery_cards.title: Costume & Prop Rentals
discovery_cards.body: Decades of theatrical inventory available to schools and community theatre at affordable rates.

discovery_cards.title: Studio Shows
discovery_cards.body: A new space for older performers to do some of the most focused, meaningful work of their time at PYT. With smaller casts and a close-knit creative process, Studio Shows are designed to build strong bonds between performers while giving them the room to really hone their skills. Less about the spotlight, more about the craft and the community you build along the way.

stats.label: Years serving youth across the peninsula

hero_lede: PYT is the Bay Area's home for community youth theatre. From first auditions to opening nights, we believe in the magic that happens when a young person steps on stage!
